title: hieracium miansarofii
side_effects: Hieracium miansarofii can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, as well as potential liver damage. Improper use can also lead to increased heart rate and blood pressure, which may result in cardiovascular complications in some individuals. Additionally, excessive consumption of Hieracium miansarofii may cause confusion, hallucinations, and other psychological disturbances. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using Hieracium miansarofii to avoid these potential side effects.
